user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new custom field with a custom value and associated escalation matrix, so that escalations can be tailored to specific priorities
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Escalation Custom Fields screen; When I click Add new custom fields and enter the field, value and escalation matrix; Then the custom field is saved and appears in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing custom field, so that its value or linked escalation matrix stays current
acceptance_criteria: Given a custom field is listed on the Escalation Custom Fields screen; When I click Edit and update its details; Then the changes are saved and reflected in the list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to link a custom field value to multiple escalation levels, so that the right escalation path is triggered
acceptance_criteria: Given I am adding or editing a custom field; When I associate it with escalation levels; Then the mapping is saved and shown in the Escalation matrix column

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the custom fields list, so that I see the latest saved entries
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Escalation Custom Fields screen; When I click refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
